framework.name: Tulip Tables as Proprietary Data Model
framework.description: Tulip Tables are a proprietary global data store — 'Records' in 'Tables' accessed across apps/stations. No mention of ISA-95 alignment, OPC-UA compatibility, or standard schema export. The data model is Tulip-native, meaning exported CSVs require knowledge of Tulip's app structure to interpret.
framework.raw_quote: Tulip Tables are a global location to store your production data. Tables are made up of Records (rows).

source.title: Export app data to CSV - Tulip Knowledge Base
